content: Positiveway Solutions Pvt. Ltd. is a technology solutions company offering website development, AI solutions, graphic design, and branding services. We help businesses go digital with practical, affordable technology.
We offer: Website Development, AI Solutions and Automation, Graphic Design, and Branding services for startups and small businesses.
We build responsive, modern websites for businesses -- from landing pages to full e-commerce platforms, using current web technologies.
We build custom AI solutions including chatbots, automation tools, and AI-powered assistants for businesses looking to automate routine work.
Positiveway Solutions runs a Data Science and AI internship program. Interns work on real projects such as AI assistants and automation tools under mentor guidance, with project-based evaluation.

To apply for an internship, candidates should submit their resume along with a short note on their area of interest (Data Science, AI, Web Development, or Design). Shortlisted candidates are contacted directly.
You can reach Positiveway Solutions through this WhatsApp assistant, or via the contact details listed on our official website and social channels.
Our team typically responds during standard business hours on weekdays. This AI assistant is available anytime for quick queries.
